entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Un compañero gratuito de aprendizaje con IA para personas que aprenden por su cuenta.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Un tutor de IA gratuito para estudiantes que quieren entender, no copiar.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Un buen flujo familiar con IA debe hacer que el estudiante sea más independiente, no más dependiente. Las familias pueden usar las páginas públicas para ver qué debe hacer cada modo antes de que un niño empiece.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Una guía para familias sobre los modos públicos de aprendizaje con IA de inspir para pistas de deberes, explicaciones, rutinas de estudio, tarjetas y conversaciones de aprendizaje más seguras.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Un estudiante, un padre, un docente y una persona autodidacta suelen buscar el mismo tutor de IA con lenguajes distintos. Las páginas separadas aclaran los casos de uso y los límites de seguridad adecuados.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: ¿Las páginas de audiencia son públicas e indexables?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Pide una pista, haz que el estudiante explique el siguiente paso y luego usa un cuestionario o una tarjeta para comprobar si la idea quedó fijada.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Pide pistas, comprobaciones y comentarios antes de pedir una respuesta terminada.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Pide prerrequisitos, un modelo sencillo, ejemplos y una idea errónea común.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Pide comentarios sobre estructura, evidencia y claridad, manteniendo tuyo el borrador final.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Pide las ideas previas necesarias, un modelo en lenguaje sencillo, un ejemplo, una tarea de práctica y una forma de comprobar la comprensión.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Pide al estudiante que explique qué cambió después de cada pista.

entries.source: Audience pages let search engines and AI answer engines distinguish students, parents, teachers, and independent learners instead of flattening everyone into one generic page.
entries.value: Las páginas de audiencia permiten que los motores de búsqueda y los motores de respuestas de IA distingan estudiantes, familias, docentes y aprendices independientes, en lugar de aplanarlos en una sola página genérica.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir es para estudiantes, padres, docentes y personas autodidactas que necesitan modos enfocados de aprendizaje con IA para explicaciones, preguntas, pistas, cuestionarios, tarjetas de memoria, comentarios y planificación de estudio.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir se organiza en modos enfocados como tutoría socrática, pistas para tareas, cuestionarios, tarjetas de memoria, comentarios de escritura, crítica de fuentes y planificación de estudio.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Los modos públicos de inspir permiten a los docentes evaluar el producto mediante flujos reales de aprendizaje antes de considerar una implementación escolar o una ruta de aula adaptada.

entries.value: Mantén la sesión centrada en evidencia de aprendizaje, no en recopilar respuestas pasivamente.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Parents son often trying a help sin taking over. inspir gives families público modos that hacer learning behavior visible: pistas, preguntas, explain-back, repaso, y study planificación.

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: estudiante autodidacta

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Los estudiantes autodidactas necesitan impulso y estructura. inspir ayuda a convertir la curiosidad en una ruta: explicar, construir, probar, repasar y seguir avanzando.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Empieza un tema desde los primeros principios

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Empezar a aprender

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Empieza con una explicación simple y luego haz preguntas socráticas hasta que puedas explicarlo con tus propias palabras.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Start con Aprende cualquier cosa for a simple explanation, Entrenador de tareas for a stuck assignment, or Creador de tarjetas de estudio when el goal is repaso.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Empieza con orientación pública y luego abre el modo adecuado.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Empieza con el modo que encaje con el momento.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Start con el público modos, then usar el escuelas page to repaso deployment steps, usar cases, and trust boundaries.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Las tareas de estudiantes, el apoyo de familias, la evaluación docente y el autoestudio necesitan enfoques distintos.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Los estudiantes necesitan ayuda rápida, pero esa ayuda debe dejar el pensamiento en sus manos. inspir dirige los momentos comunes de estudio a modos públicos enfocados en lugar de una caja genérica de respuestas.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Estudiantes, familias, docentes, and self-taught estudiantes búsqueda for different things. Estos pages route each audience to el right público modo, guía, and estudio flujo de trabajo.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Apoya la escritura conservando la voz

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Docentes necesitan more than a generic chatbot. Ellos necesitan predictable aprendizaje behaviors: preguntar preguntas, comprobar razonaring, generate práctica, preserve estudiante voice, and hacer misconceptions visible.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: audience pages hacer el expected aprendizaje behavior explicit so el first session empezars con better judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: audience búsquedaes esto hub está construido para respuesta.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: pages do not expose privado conversacións. Ellos organizar público modos, indicaciones, guías, flujo de trabajos, and safety boundaries so a estudiante puede empezar in el right place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: El mismo tutor de IA puede ser una pista para tareas, un ciclo de explicación supervisado por familias, una superficie de evaluación docente o un coach de autoestudio. La página debe dejarlo claro.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: búsquedaes esto page está diseñado para respuesta.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: self-estudio challenge is no solo finding information. It is choosing el next right action and knowing whether el idea actually stuck.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: strongest SEO pages do not strand a estudiante. Ellos conectar el audience intent to rutas, flujo de trabajos, guías, and repeatable repaso.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: strongest estudiante flujo de trabajo is not respuesta-copying. It is a loop: explicar el stuck point, preguntar one better pregunta, get a pista, try again, then repaso el miss.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Estos are live invitado puntos de entrada. Ellos are público and indexable, mientras privado usarr conversacións stay outside sitemap and IA descubrimiento files.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Estos phrases are visible to estudiantes and included in structured descubrimiento so IA respuesta engines puede understand el audience-specific purpose of el page.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Convierte la confusión en un cuestionario o una tarjeta antes de seguir adelante.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Convierte errores en repaso

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Convierte el primer clic en un ciclo de aprendizaje completo.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Tutorías

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: Entender un tema antes del examen

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Usa un modo ajustado para pistas, preguntas, cuestionarios, tarjetas, feedback de escritura o planificación.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Usa la IA para pistas, explicaciones, revisión de errores y ciclos de repaso. No le pidas que produzca una respuesta final que no puedas explicar.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Usa Code Tutor o Project Coach para convertir un objetivo vago en un pequeño siguiente paso comprobable.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Usa hint-first y explain-back workflows para homework support.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Usa Entrenador de tareas to ask para a hint, then ask the estudiante to explain the next move.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Usa inspir as a free IA tutor para students: homework hints, Socratic preguntas, math step checks, writing feedback, cuestionarios, tarjetas, y exam prep.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Usa inspir to learn anything independently con explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, estudio plans, y habit support.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Usa Aprende cualquier cosa to get a simpler modol, prerequisite ideas, y examples at the right level.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Usa público modo descriptions to choose the behavior antes de a session starts.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Usa quiz y flashcard modos para recuperación activa, then route missed items into repaso.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Usa cuestionarios y tarjetas to make missed preguntas visible y repeatable.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Usa cuestionarios, tarjetas, y Socratic preguntas so the estudiante shows what they understand.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Usa Research Assistant, Source Critic, y Concept Map Builder to organize claims y evidencia.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Usa fuente critique para claims you might cite or act on.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Usa Study Plan Builder y Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart después de missed days.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Usa Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions y restarts visible.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Usa Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use cuestionarios, tarjetas, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Usa the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, y rollout steps.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Usa Writing Coach para feedback on structure, clarity, evidencia, y revision priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Useful IA aprendizaje has a clear contract.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. Audience pages link only to público guest modos, guides, prompt starters, aprendizaje paths, y AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. Public guest modos let teachers test aprendizaje behavior antes de discussing a custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Sí. Los modos públicos de invitado y las páginas para cada audiencia están diseñados para que los padres puedan revisar el comportamiento de aprendizaje antes de confiar en él.
